WITH atom_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        c.bond_id,
        a1.element AS element1,
        a2.element AS element2
    FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
),
bond_element_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        b.bond_id,
        b.molecule_id,
        b.bond_type,
        CASE 
            WHEN ap.element1 <= ap.element2 THEN ap.element1 || '-' || ap.element2
            ELSE ap.element2 || '-' || ap.element1
        END AS element_pair...

WITH atom_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        c.bond_id,
        a1.element AS element1,
        a2.element AS element2
    FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
),
bond_element_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        b.bond_id,
        b.molecule_id,
        b.bond_type,
        CASE 
            WHEN ap.element1 <= ap.element2 THEN ap.element1 || '-' || ap.element2
            ELSE ap.element2 || '-' || ap.element1
        END AS element_pair...

WITH atom_pairs AS (
    SELECT 
        c.bond_id,
        MIN(a1.element, a2.element) || '-' || MAX(a1.element, a2.element) AS element_pair
    FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
),
pair_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        element_pair,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM atom_pairs
    GROUP BY element_pair
),
top_pair AS (
    SELECT element_pair
    FROM pair_stats
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
